### Checklist
- [ ] I've reviewed `CONTRIBUTING.md` guidelines.
- [ ] I am not promoting this as the author, owner or affiliate of the tool/service, if I am the author, owner or affiliate of the tool/service, I will state why it is valuable and it is not spam.
- [ ] This resource is completely free to access (or has a highly valuable, free tier for job seekers to explore).

### Why is this genuinely valuable to a job seeker right now?
